keys: Pro tip: run in circles so you can collect the xp gems the enemies drop!
en: Pro tip: run in circles so you can collect the xp gems the enemies drop!
ru: Подсказка: бегайте кругами, чтобы собирать кристаллы опыта, выпадающие из врагов!

keys: A spear of ice is thrown at a random enemy
en: A spear of ice is thrown at a random enemy
ru: В случайного врага бросается ледяное копье

keys: An addition Ice Spear is thrown
en: An addition Ice Spear is thrown

keys: Ice Spears now pass through another enemy and do + 3 damage
en: Ice Spears now pass through another enemy and do + 3 damage
ru: Ледяные копья теперь проходят сквозь одного врага и наносят +3 урона

keys: An additional 2 Ice Spears are thrown
en: An additional 2 Ice Spears are thrown

keys: A magical javelin will follow you attacking enemies in a straight line
en: A magical javelin will follow you attacking enemies in a straight line
ru: Магический дротик следует за вами, атакуя врагов по прямой

keys: The javelin will now attack an additional enemy per attack
en: The javelin will now attack an additional enemy per attack
ru: Дротик теперь атакует еще одного врага за атаку

keys: The javelin will attack another additional enemy per attack
en: The javelin will attack another additional enemy per attack
ru: Дротик атакует еще одного дополнительного врага за атаку

keys: The javelin now does + 5 damage per attack and causes 20% additional knockback
en: The javelin now does + 5 damage per attack and causes 20% additional knockback
ru: Дротик теперь наносит +5 урона и отталкивает на 20% сильнее

keys: A tornado is created and random heads somewhere in the players direction
en: A tornado is created and random heads somewhere in the players direction
ru: Создается торнадо, которое случайно движется в направлении игрока

keys: The Tornado cooldown is reduced by 0.5 seconds
en: The Tornado cooldown is reduced by 0.5 seconds

keys: An additional tornado is created and the knockback is increased by 25%
en: An additional tornado is created and the knockback is increased by 25%
ru: Создается еще торнадо, а отбрасывание увеличивается на 25%

keys: Reduces Damage By an additional 1 point
en: Reduces Damage By an additional 1 point

keys: Movement Speed Increased by 50% of base speed
en: Movement Speed Increased by 50% of base speed
ru: Скорость передвижения увеличена на 50% от базовой

keys: Movement Speed Increased by an additional 50% of base speed
en: Movement Speed Increased by an additional 50% of base speed
ru: Скорость передвижения увеличена еще на 50% от базовой

keys: Movement Speed Increased an additional 50% of base speed
en: Movement Speed Increased an additional 50% of base speed
ru: Скорость передвижения увеличена еще на 50% от базовой

keys: Increases the size of spells an additional 10% of their base size
en: Increases the size of spells an additional 10% of their base size
ru: Увеличивает размер заклинаний на 10% от их базового размера

keys: Decreases of the cooldown of spells by an additional 5% of their base time
en: Decreases of the cooldown of spells by an additional 5% of their base time
ru: Уменьшает время перезарядки заклинаний на 5% от базового

keys: Your spells now spawn 1 more additional attack
en: Your spells now spawn 1 more additional attack
ru: Ваши заклинания теперь создают на 1 атаку больше

keys: Your spells now spawn an additional attack
en: Your spells now spawn an additional attack
ru: Ваши заклинания теперь создают дополнительную атаку
